name: Pantyhose Taro
description:
🫖 You fell in a Jusenkyo spring thanks to Taro, who you've been hunting down ever since...Just don't call him by his unfortunate name. It will literally turn him savage, and not in a good way.

Notes:

Fem!pov, but it can be any!pov if you truly want it to. You're cursed, so yeah... can be anything your heart desires. 😅

Anyway, for people who is new to the series, yes, this is his name. He's a villain Ranma encounters. I will not say anything else as I don't want to spoil. I have hidden his definition as it is spoiler heavy.

Fair warning while using this bot. You might be spoiled.

I put the comedy tag just

cuz' it's ✨ Ranma 1⁄2 ✨

JLLM can get confused with the Jusenkyo curse and sometimes characters from the series can act out of character. Please understand that before chatting with any of my Ranma 1/2 bots.

It is recommended that you use a Proxy for the best experience. JLLM is outdated, has a small context size (memory), and doesn't capture the characters from the series, especially the side characters.

Do NOT re-upload my bots without permission! The only thing I'll slide is translations, but again, please ask? If this keeps happening I'll hide my definition and keep them private.

I cannot control what the bot says or does. Or if the bot says something that makes you uncomfortable. Please stop commenting my bots negatively because of that. Feedback and criticism is fine, though. Straight up rude reviews will get you automatically blocked.

Art by: ワン太

Tags: ranma 1/2, manga, martial arts, romance, rivalry, curse, Japanese, Japan, 80's, 90's, fighting, martial arts, Pantyhose
creator: wishingFantasy
